examples: Nobody doubts the power of lucre.
I'm often asked what I miss about my old world of lucre and business?
He is still dazzled by lucre, but also determined to give warning of the dangers of excessive leverage.
But even that vast sum of taxpayer lucre cannot will the necessary innovations into being.
On return the lucre would pay for goods destined for Lisbon and silks for the next voyage to Nagasaki.
